gate.exception: The 250 KB/1 MB target is not yet feasible while shipping the documented standalone CLI/MCP tooling plus Phase Q consumer surfaces, atomic preflight, and the change-map JSON Schema. The 421 KB ceiling is retained after T04 by linking repository-hosted legacy migration/demo and experimental-runtime hardening guides instead of duplicating them in the gate tarball; source maps were removed in V04, and this exception must be reconsidered before ArkGate 4.
